hub.metaDescription: Explore Mohtaoua's proprietary solutions: e-NFC, Archidoc, Restaurant ERP, CRM, AI agents, WhatsApp automation, websites, mobile apps and BI.
hub.title: <highlight>Premium</highlight> digital products
hub.description: Proprietary software, platforms and automation tools built by Mohtaoua to accelerate digital transformation for Moroccan businesses.

hubOverview.what: Mohtaoua's digital solutions catalog: SaaS products, industry platforms and automation tools developed in-house.
hubOverview.who: Executives, IT leaders, operations managers and founders looking for turnkey products rather than custom development.
benefits: Support in French, Arabic and English

e-nfc.title: e-NFC
e-nfc.description: Digital business cards, NFC products, QR codes and smart profiles for professional networking.

archidoc.title: Archidoc
archidoc.description: Document management, secure archiving, OCR and DMS for your digital transformation.

erp-restaurant.title: Restaurant ERP
erp-restaurant.description: Complete restaurant management: POS, kitchen display, inventory, purchasing and analytics.

crm.title: Mohtaoua CRM
crm.description: CRM with automation, lead tracking and sales pipelines for SMBs and sales teams.

ai-agents.title: AI Agents
ai-agents.description: AI assistants, customer support bots and internal business assistants.

whatsapp-automation.title: WhatsApp Automation
whatsapp-automation.description: Automated conversations, notifications, reminders and CRM integration via WhatsApp Business API.

business-automation.title: Business Automation
business-automation.description: Workflow automation with AI, APIs, n8n and modern integrations for productivity.

website-builder.title: Website Builder
website-builder.description: Professional websites, landing pages and high-performance e-commerce with built-in SEO.

mobile-applications.title: Mobile Applications
mobile-applications.description: Android, iOS and cross-platform apps to digitize services and retain customers.

business-intelligence.title: Business Intelligence
business-intelligence.description: Dashboards, analytics, reporting and KPI visualization to steer your business.
